name: RDP Connection Inititated from Domain Controller
description: Initiation of RDP connection from a domain controller is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'RDP Connection Inititated from Domain Controller'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WinServer event_source="Microsoft-Windows-TerminalServices-RemoteConnectionManager" event_id=1149 | rename eventxml.param3 as source_address | search source_address IN WINDOWS_DC`.
